# JM MARBEL — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> A company specializing in the import, marketing, and installation of marble, stone stairs, and stone cladding. The business operates in the construction and finishing materials industry, offering a full end-to-end service from sourcing premium stone materials to professional installation. The brand revolves around quality craftsmanship, durability, and the timeless elegance of natural stone.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About JM MARBEL
A company specializing in the import, marketing, and installation of marble, stone stairs, and stone cladding. The business operates in the construction and finishing materials industry, offering a full end-to-end service from sourcing premium stone materials to professional installation. The brand revolves around quality craftsmanship, durability, and the timeless elegance of natural stone.

## Services/Products
- יבוא שיש
- שיווק שיש
- התקנת שיש
- מדרגות שיש
- חיפוי אבן

## Target Audience
- קבלני יוקרה
- מעצבי פנים
- יזמי נדל"ן
- בעלי בתים משפצים
- מנהלי נכסים מסחריים

## Industry
בנייה וחומרי גמר
